summary: Frontend-only validation completed for layout/nav/quotes UI overhaul on public preview URL. Dashboard shell and top nav render correctly, but multiple target routes fail with runtime 500 due missing Supabase env vars.

ui_bugs.issue: Quotes UI does not render; runtime error overlay blocks page content and Create Quote button is not visible.

integration_issues.flow: Top-nav routing from /dashboard to app sections
integration_issues.issue: Navigation links exist and are clickable, but /quotes, /jobs, /invoices, /clients, /finance return HTTP 500 in preview. Only /dashboard and /settings returned 200.

issues: Dark shell styling, spacing, and blue-accent nav states look consistent and readable.

action_items: Set required root Next.js env vars in deployed preview: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.
Re-verify all top-nav routes after env injection; current broken paths violate routing acceptance criteria.
Keep existing quotes/page.tsx UI logic; issue is pre-render env crash before component-level error fallback can run.
critical_code_review_comments: RCA: /app/lib/supabase/env.server.ts throws synchronously when NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL is unset; this aborts rendering before quotes page error UI can display.
Public frontend env source file expected by workflow (/app/frontend/.env) is absent in this Next.js structure; environment provisioning relies on runtime/deployment env and is currently incomplete.
Non-blocking: console shows hydration warning in dashboard drag/drop widgets (aria-describedby mismatch), not part of requested UI overhaul but should be monitored.
test_credentials: MISSING: /app/memory/test_credentials.md not found (auth flows were not part of this test run).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard route at https://layout-overhaul-15.preview.emergentagent.com/dashboard is testable and shows new shell/nav. Reproduced hard failure on /quotes with runtime message: 'Missing required environment variable: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL'. Route status sweep: /dashboard=200, /settings=200, /quotes|/jobs|/invoices|/clients|/finance=500, /=500.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: open /dashboard, click nav-link-quotes or visit /quotes directly. Result: Next dev overlay shows Missing required environment variable NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL; quotes title/create button are absent. Root cause: getSupabaseEnv() in /app/lib/supabase/env.server.ts hard-fails on missing env, and createClient() in /app/lib/supabase/server.ts invokes it during server render. Mitigation: provide required env vars in preview runtime; then retest nav links and quotes UI acceptance criteria.
